perturbation.original_text: “Information” shall include the f act that the business is for sale plus other data. The term Information does not include any information, which is, or becomes, generally available to the public or is already in your possession.
perturbation.changed_text: “Information” shall include the f act that the business is for sale plus other data.
perturbation.explanation: By removing the exclusion of information already publicly available or in the recipient's possession from the definition of 'Information', the modified text broadens the definition considerably. This creates an in-text contradiction because, previously, the agreement only protected novel information. Now, the agreement could be interpreted to cover public knowledge, which is an unreasonable restriction. This significantly impacts the enforceability of the confidentiality clause.
perturbation.contradicted_text: That information provided on businesses by the Blockbuster Franchisee is sensi tive and confidential. That I will not disclose any Information regarding these businesses to any other person who has not also signed and dated this agreement.
perturbation.justification: The original text excludes publicly available information from the definition of 'Information'. The changed text removes this exclusion, broadening the definition. The contradicted text states that 'information provided on businesses by the Blockbuster Franchisee is sensitive and confidential' and that the user will not disclose any 'Information' regarding these businesses. By removing the exclusion, the changed text now means that even publicly available information is considered confidential and cannot be disclosed, which directly contradicts the implicit understanding that confidentiality applies to novel or non-public information. Thus, the modification creates a direct conflict, making it a strong in-text contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: All Informa tion provided to review the business will be returned to the Franchisee without retaining companies, summaries, analyses or extracts there of in the event the review is terminated.
perturbation.changed_text: All Informa tion provided to review the business will be returned to the Franchisee in the event the review is terminated.
perturbation.explanation: By removing 'without retaining companies, summaries, analyses or extracts thereof', the agreement is now ambiguous about whether the potential buyer can retain any derived materials from the information provided, only requiring the return of the direct information provided. This contradicts the implied intention of keeping the business details confidential; the summaries could reveal confidential information.
perturbation.contradicted_text: That information provided on businesses by the Blockbuster Franchisee is sensi tive and confidential. That I will not disclose any Information regarding these businesses to any other person who has not also signed and dated this agreement.
perturbation.justification: The original text explicitly stated that no summaries, analyses, or extracts of the provided information could be retained. The changed text removes this restriction, only requiring the return of the original information. This creates a contradiction with the contradicted text, which states that the information is confidential and should not be disclosed. By allowing the potential buyer to retain summaries, the changed text enables the potential disclosure of confidential information derived from the original documents, thus directly contradicting the confidentiality clause.

perturbation.original_text: That I will not contact the Seller, his employees, supplies or custom ers except through Tameracq Partners, Inc.
perturbation.changed_text: That I will not contact the Seller, his employees, supplies or custom ers.
perturbation.explanation: By removing 'except through Tameracq Partners, Inc.', the agreement now creates an absolute prohibition on contacting the Seller or related parties. This introduces a contradiction because it's reasonable to expect some contact *through* the broker for due diligence, negotiating terms, etc. This complete ban is likely unenforceable and creates ambiguity regarding the permissible scope of interaction.
perturbation.contradicted_text: That all correspondence, inquiries, offers to purchase and negotiations relating to the purchase or lease or any business presented to me, or companies I represent, by the Blockbuster Franchisee, will be conducted excl usively through Tameracq Partners, Inc.
perturbation.justification: The original text allowed contact with the Seller through Tameracq Partners, Inc. The changed text prohibits any contact with the Seller. The contradicted text states that all negotiations will be conducted through Tameracq Partners, Inc. The removal of 'except through Tameracq Partners, Inc.' directly contradicts the statement that all negotiations will be conducted through them, as it now suggests no contact is permissible, thus preventing negotiations through any means, including Tameracq Partners.

perturbation.original_text: That, should I enter into an agreement to pur chase a business the Franchisee offers for sale, I grant to the Seller the right to obtain, through standard reporting agencies, financial and credit information concerning my self or the companies or other parties I represent and understand that this informa tion will be held conf idential by Seller and Tameracq Partners, Inc and will only be used for the purpose of Seller extending credit to me.
perturbation.changed_text: That, should I enter into an agreement to pur chase a business the Franchisee offers for sale, I grant to the Seller the right to obtain financial and credit information concerning my self or the companies or other parties I represent.
perturbation.explanation: By removing the phrase 'through standard reporting agencies and understand that this information will be held confidential by Seller and Tameracq Partners, Inc and will only be used for the purpose of Seller extending credit to me', the contract now lacks limitations on how the seller obtains the financial information, and the purpose for which it can be used and the confidentiality clause is now removed. It removes the reassurance that the information will only be used for extending credit. This could create legal challenges because it lacks reasonable limitations.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Our Agreement with the Seller requires that we obtain a non-disclosure and confidentiality agreement and evidence of financial ability before disclosing the name and location of his business. This information will be kept confidential.
perturbation.justification: The original text ensured confidentiality and limited the use of financial information obtained to extending credit. The changed text removes these limitations. The contradicted text states that 'This information will be kept confidential.' By removing the confidentiality clause in the changed text, a contradiction is created, as the seller is no longer explicitly bound to confidentiality regarding the financial information they obtain, directly conflicting with the contradicted text's assurance that the information will be kept confidential.

perturbation.original_text: That all correspondence, inquiries, offers to purchase and negotiations relating to the purchase or lease or any business presented to me, or companies I represent, by the Blockbuster Franchisee, will be conducted excl usively through Tameracq Partners, Inc.
perturbation.changed_text: That all correspondence, inquiries, offers to purchase and negotiations relating to the purchase or lease or any business presented to me, or companies I represent, by the Blockbuster Franchisee, will be conducted.
perturbation.explanation: By removing 'exclusively through Tameracq Partners, Inc.', the text now implies that while the correspondence *will* be conducted, there is no longer a specified mediator. This contradicts the spirit of the agreement, which intends all communication to pass through the Franchisee to maintain order, confidentiality, and ensure their commission. This creates ambiguity in how negotiations should proceed.
perturbation.contradicted_text: That I will not contact the Seller, his employees, supplies or custom ers.
perturbation.justification: The original text mandated that all communication with the seller go through Tameracq Partners, Inc. The changed text removes this requirement, implying communication can occur without them. This directly contradicts the section stating 'That I will not contact the Seller, his employees, supplies or custom ers.', because without the intermediary (Tameracq Partners, Inc.) there is a possibility that contact will be made with the seller. Therefore, the omission creates a contradiction.
